news.t: GRANITESHARES HITS $6 BILLION AUM AS NVDL SURGES

holdings.infoBox: AMDL is an equity ETF with a total of 19 individual holdings. The top holdings are Graniteshares Long Amd Swap Cantor stock at 45.21%, Recv Long 2x Amd Trs Bmo at 44.40%, Recv Long 2x Amd Trs Nm at 35.80%, Amd Equity Swap at 29.93%, and Recv Long 2x Amd Trs Cs at 22.86%.

overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long AMD Daily ETF (AMDL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Advanced Micro Devices stock. AMDL was launched on Mar 4, 2024 and is issued by GraniteShares.
